message:
test: wave 85 — 7 pure data-type tests for trace ids, rfc6330, records

Coverage: TraceId (Clone, Copy, Eq, Hash), SymbolSpanId (Clone, Copy, Eq, Hash),
LtTuple (Debug, Clone, Copy, Eq), EpochId (Debug, Clone, Copy, Eq, Ord, Hash),
EpochWindow (Debug, Clone, Copy, Eq), SymbolicObligationKind (Debug, Clone, Copy, Eq),
SymbolicObligationState (Debug, Clone, Copy, Eq).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
